# ElicitationForm.IsNumberSchema method

Returns `true` when *value* is a valid `NumberSchema` — a JSON object whose `type` is `"number"` or `"integer"`, with any present `minimum`/`maximum` numeric (spec §20.4, R-20.4-c, R-20.4-e).

```csharp
public static bool IsNumberSchema(JsonNode? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate property schema. |

## Return Value

`true` when a valid number schema.
